calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-11-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-11-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Arnold Evje, Esq. for for Plaintiff: S. K. Patel.
Plaintiff's Witness: Kiran Patel, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Nancy Van Cleave.
Exhibit 1 - Three Day Notice---------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 788 O'farrell St., #110, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,500.00
Costs $151.30
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.
